title: 🌿 Iterated Function Systems (IFS)
name: Iterated Function Systems (IFS)
what_it_is: Fractals built from repeated geometric transformations. Famous for ferns, leaves, galaxies, and recursively branching forms.
how_to_use: wings patterned with recursive IFS symmetry—each feather a smaller echo of the whole
gown grown from IFS logic: organic spirals of translucent scale-leaves
animation_behavior: Continuous growth outward—branching, flowering, pulsing from a point of origin ---
